title: StudioDash FAQ
description: Find answers to the most common questions about StudioDash, including availability, supported platforms, integrations, reporting, security, and future development.
summary: Everything you need to know about StudioDash before joining the private beta.

sections.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
paragraphs: Whether you're interested in joining the private beta or simply want to learn more about StudioDash, this page answers the questions developers ask most often.
If you're looking for more detailed information, explore the dedicated guides covering features, integrations, reporting, security, and automation.

faq.question: What is StudioDash?
faq.answer: StudioDash is a native Mac and iPad analytics workspace for independent developers. It brings together app performance, revenue, website analytics, provider health, and operational insights in one place.

faq.question: Who is StudioDash designed for?
faq.answer: StudioDash is built for independent developers, solo creators, and small studios who manage apps, games, websites, and multiple developer services.

faq.question: Is StudioDash available now?
faq.answer: StudioDash is currently preparing for a private beta. A limited number of independent developers and small studios will be invited before the public release.

faq.question: Which platforms are supported?
faq.answer: StudioDash is being developed as a native application for macOS and iPadOS.

faq.question: Which services can StudioDash connect to?
faq.answer: StudioDash supports App Store Connect, Cloudflare, AdMob, AdSense, Google Search Console, with additional integrations such as GitHub and Google Ads continuing to be developed.

faq.question: Does StudioDash replace provider dashboards?
faq.answer: No. StudioDash complements existing provider dashboards by bringing key information together in one place. Provider portals remain the best place for account management, billing, permissions, and advanced configuration.

faq.question: What does Provider Health mean?
faq.answer: Provider Health gives you an instant overview of each connected service, showing whether it's healthy, needs attention, has encountered an error, or still requires configuration.

faq.question: What's the difference between demo and live data?
faq.answer: Demo data is used to demonstrate StudioDash while the product is still in development. Live data comes directly from your connected provider accounts. StudioDash clearly distinguishes between the two.

faq.question: Can I view historical trends?
faq.answer: Yes. Where supported by connected providers, StudioDash lets you review historical performance alongside current operational information.

faq.question: Will StudioDash include reporting and automation?
faq.answer: Yes. Planned features include exports, scheduled reports, forecasting, intelligent summaries, and additional automation. These features will be introduced as StudioDash continues to evolve.

faq.question: How does StudioDash protect my data?
faq.answer: StudioDash is designed around secure credential storage, provider-specific permissions, and clear separation between demonstration data and live information. Connected services always use your own authorised accounts.

faq.question: Where should I start?
faq.answer: Start with the Overview page, then explore Features, Dashboard, Integrations, Revenue Analytics, Reporting, Automation & Sync, and Security & Privacy to discover everything StudioDash has to offer.
